creator: squat@squat.no
text: I did submit a new patch (194812) to update net/miniupnpd to 1.9 (released five days after 1.8.20141022) against what was in the ports tree an hour ago. Sorry for the unnecessary work that may have generated. Just submit this one first and I can submit a new patch in that bug, against what will be in the ports tree after this one is submitted.
